prompt: When was a picture of St. Thomas Aquinas first added to the Wikipedia page on the Principle of double effect? Answer using the format DD/MM/YYYY.
actual:
19/02/2009

The picture of St. Thomas Aquinas first appeared on the Wikipedia page for "Principle of double effect" on **19 February 2009**, when the `{{Thomism}}` sidebar template was added to the article (revision 271766439). This template, created the same day, contained an image of Thomas Aquinas — specifically a detail from "Triumph of St. Thomas Aquinas over Averroes" by Benozzo Gozzoli (`Benozzo Gozzoli 004a.jpg`). WikiBlame confirmed the insertion of `{{Thomism}}` occurred between the revisions of 18 January 2009 and 19 February 2009.

input.thought:

1. I used WikiBlame to search for "Thomas Aquinas" on the Wikipedia page "Principle of double effect"

I notice in the revision history: revid 1172710458 says "Content from [[Principle of double effect (temporary)]] was merged into Principle of double effect on 19:31, March 7, 2006"

This suggests there was a temporary page. Maybe the image was on that page or on the page during a different period.

Let me check the XTools page information which might show more details, or look at the current page for any infobox that might pull in an image from Wikidata.

Excellent! I now have all the pieces:

1. The image of St. Thomas Aquinas on the "Principle of double effect" Wikipedia page comes from the Template:Thomism sidebar template.
2. That template has contained an image of Thomas Aquinas since its very first revision (06:39, 19 February 2009) - specifically "Benozzo Gozzoli 004a.jpg", a detail from "Triumph of St. Thomas Aquinas over Averroes."
3. The `{{Thomism}}` template was first added to the "Principle of double effect" article between revision 264854217 (12:08, 18 January 2009) and revision 271766439 (06:41, 19 February 2009).

WikiBlame confirmed: "Insertion found between 12:08, 18 January 2009 and 06:41, 19 February 2009"

Since the Template:Thomism itself was created with the image already in it on 19 February 2009, and the template was first added to the article on that same date (19 February 2009), the picture of St. Thomas Aquinas first appeared on the Wikipedia page on 19/02/2009.
